scenarios.name: ETL Pipeline
scenarios.reason: Deterministic transformations, SQL-based, scheduling, no LLM needed

scenarios.name: Chat-Based Reporting
scenarios.reason: NL understanding required, wraps existing report process with LLM

scenarios.name: CWB Approval Workflow
scenarios.reason: Deterministic approval logic, UI-driven, transaction control, no LLM

scenarios.name: CWB with Exception Analysis
scenarios.reason: Deterministic flow + adaptive reasoning for exceptions

scenarios.name: Invoice Processing from PDFs
scenarios.reason: Unstructured data, LLM extraction, NL understanding

scenarios.name: Autonomous Compliance Checking
scenarios.reason: Multi-step reasoning, independent decisions, minimal human oversight

scenarios.name: Performance-Critical Batch Processing
scenarios.reason: No LLM latency, scheduling, deterministic, transaction control

integration_patterns.name: Agent Function Wraps Process
integration_patterns.flow: User Request -> LLM Agent -> Agent Function -> Process -> Result

integration_patterns.name: Process Calls Agent Team
integration_patterns.flow: Process Start -> Nodes -> Agent Team Node -> Agent Team -> Nodes -> End
integration_patterns.use_case: Structured workflow with adaptive reasoning step

integration_patterns.name: Multi-Agent Pipeline
integration_patterns.flow: Input -> Agent Team -> [Agent 1 -> Agent 2 -> Agent 3] -> Output
integration_patterns.use_case: Complex multi-step analysis requiring specialized agents

integration_patterns.name: Autonomous Workflow
integration_patterns.flow: Trigger -> Autonomous Agent -> Agent Functions -> Validation -> Result
integration_patterns.use_case: Independent multi-step tasks with safety controls

DETERMINISTIC.rationale: Deterministic archetypes map to procedural Process Builder workflows; hybrid when LLM enhancement adds value

AGENTIC.rationale: Agentic archetypes require LLM capabilities; hybrid when existing processes need agent augmentation

GENERATIVE.rationale: Generative archetypes need NL/creative capabilities; hybrid when combined with structured workflows
